prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Nausea and reduced appetite over the last 1-2 months after starting injections.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.2 kg; Height 167.9 cm; BMI 20.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/64 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 9.8%; 6 months ago 9.3%; 3 months ago 8.8%; current 9.3%), FPG (12 months ago 226mg/dL; 9 months ago 258mg/dL; 6 months ago 198mg/dL; 3 months ago 191mg/dL; current 247mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.1kg; 9 months ago 58.2kg; 6 months ago 56.3kg; 3 months ago 56.1kg; current 57.2kg), Height (12 months ago 167.9cm; 9 months ago 167.9cm; 6 months ago 167.9cm; 3 months ago 167.9cm; current 167.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 64mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 33U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 558mg/g; 9 months ago 466mg/g; 6 months ago 660mg/g; 3 months ago 549mg/g; current 652mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 176mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.95 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
